content: I had so many ideas that I started to get into the habit of carrying a pen and a notebook with me even when I went for walks.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Nuel (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Avevo così tante idee che iniziai a prendere l'abitudine di portare con me una penna ed un taccuino anche quando andavo
